use_cases: Displaying a 404 error when a page or resource is not found
Providing a fallback navigation option with a home button and back arrow
Offering theme toggle functionality (dark/light mode) within the error page
Serving as a general-purpose error page for web applications
Improving user experience during navigation failures with clear error messaging
ai_summary: A minimalist 404 error page component with integrated navigation options including a home button and back arrow. Features a theme toggle for dark/light mode switching and includes an inlined Button component with default and outline variants. Designed for general web application use to gracefully handle page-not-found scenarios.
